title: neillia hanceana
intro: Neillia hanceana, also known as Chinese Neillia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is a type of shrub native to China, with medicinal properties attributed to its leaves and stems. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, colds, and respiratory issues. Traditionally, Neillia hanceana has been used to make herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, which are said to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system.
